records.short_description: VPN gateway dropping connections for all remote employees
records.description: Since 2026-06-20 22:00 UTC, the Cisco ASA VPN gateway at vpn.corp.taskpilot.io has been dropping TLS sessions approximately every 12-15 minutes. Affects all 47 remote employees. Root cause suspected: license count exceeded after 3 new starters this week. IT helpdesk receiving 20+ tickets per hour.
records.business_impact: 47 remote employees unable to access internal systems. Engineering velocity blocked.

records.short_description: Production SSL certificate for internal CA expired — internal services failing
records.description: The internal certificate authority cert used to sign internal service-to-service TLS certs expired at midnight. As a result, the Vault secrets manager, internal Grafana instance and the Kubernetes admission webhook are all returning TLS errors. Services that validate internal certs are failing health checks and being removed from load balancer rotation.
records.business_impact: Vault, Grafana and k8s admission webhook unavailable. 6 internal services failing health checks.

records.short_description: Nightly backup job failing on fileserver-02 for 8 consecutive nights
records.description: The rsync backup job for fileserver-02 (stores engineering artefacts, build caches, design files) has failed for 8 consecutive nights. Failure reason: disk quota exceeded on backup-nas-01. Last successful backup: 2026-06-12. No alerts fired because the monitoring rule checks the wrong job name after a rename. Undetected data risk.
records.business_impact: 8 days without backup. Any disk failure on fileserver-02 means unrecoverable data loss.

records.short_description: SMTP relay queue backlogged — outbound emails delayed 45-90 minutes
records.description: The Postfix SMTP relay on mail-relay-01 has a queue backlog of 4,200 messages. Outbound emails (password resets, billing notifications, webhook failure alerts) are delayed 45-90 minutes. Cause: IP address added to Spamhaus blocklist following a phishing simulation campaign last Thursday that triggered abuse reports.
records.business_impact: Password resets and billing notifications delayed. Customer-facing workflows impacted.

records.short_description: DNS resolution intermittent failure for *.corp.taskpilot.io internal domains
records.description: Internal DNS resolution for corp.taskpilot.io subdomains is failing intermittently (~30% failure rate). Requests that should resolve via the internal Bind resolver fall through to public DNS and return NXDOMAIN. Happens more frequently during business hours. Suspected cause: Bind resolver overloaded after VPN traffic spike.
records.business_impact: 30% failure rate on internal service discovery. CI/CD pipelines and staging deploys intermittently failing.

records.short_description: Adobe Creative Cloud license renewal overdue — 12 users locked out
records.description: Adobe CC annual license expired 2026-06-18. 12 users (design team + marketing) are now locked out of Illustrator, Photoshop and Premiere. Procurement sent renewal PO on 2026-06-10 but Adobe billing has not processed it. Escalation call scheduled for today but needs IT manager approval for expedited renewal.
records.business_impact: Design team blocked. Sprint design deliverables at risk.

records.short_description: Office printer fleet — 4 of 6 printers offline after firmware update
records.description: 4 of 6 HP printers in the London office went offline after an automatic firmware update pushed by HP JetAdvantage Management on 2026-06-20. The firmware version 24.5.1 has a known issue with our WPA2-Enterprise WiFi authentication. HP has issued a rollback procedure but it requires physical access to each device.
records.business_impact: Printing limited to 2 printers. Finance team invoice printing impacted.

records.short_description: 3 new-starter workstations not provisioned — engineers cannot start work
records.description: Three new engineers joining 2026-06-23 (Monday) have no provisioned workstations. IT requisition raised 2026-06-09 for MacBook Pro M3s. Hardware arrived 2026-06-17 but sat in the goods-in bay — nobody picked up the delivery notification. MDM enrolment, dev tool installation and GitHub access all pending.
records.business_impact: 3 engineers unable to work on day 1. Delayed sprint contribution.
